utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items by name. Now check if each one is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details. 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance and specifies monthly cost (445), so it is complete. 2) property_coverage: should include home/contents insurance with costs, but although coverage and exclusions are listed, no cost is provided (only coverage_limit, not cost), so this is incomplete. 3) travel_coverage: should include travel insurance with costs, but cost is missing, so incomplete. 4) additional_services: includes services and enhancements with no costs—costs are required, so incomplete. 5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown, so complete. Therefore, 2 of 5 items are fully specified (health_coverage, total_budget).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected the 'Global Active Life14' plan for health coverage, which includes both physical and mental health benefits under one umbrella policy. This plan is not listed in the ground-truth dataset, but based on its features (telemedicine, gym reimbursement, preventive care, psychiatry services, stress management, crisis intervention, specialist access, and global network), it most closely resembles the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health. Therefore, the health coverage is mapped to the corresponding LifeFirst plans. For property coverage, the plan includes protections similar to electronics, liability, accommodation, and natural disaster, aligning most with 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage'. For travel coverage, the benefits (adventure sports, business travel, evacuation, global network) align most with 'InsurePlus Standard Plan'. Additionally, the plan lists telemedicine and wellness programs, which are rated under health enhancement services. Thus, the ratings are derived from the closest corresponding entries in the ground-truth list.
